riddles.question: Aisi kaunsi cheez hai jise todne ke liye hi istemal kiya jata hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jo raat ko aati hai bina bulaye, aur subah hote hi chali jaati hai?
Jitna khichho utna bada, chhodo to wapas aaye. Batao kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo gareebon ke paas hota hai, ameeron ko chahiye hota hai, aur khane se aadmi mar jaata hai?
Ek kamra hai jisme na khidki hai na darwaza, phir bhi log rehte hain. Kya hai woh?
Woh kya hai jo paani mein rehti hai lekin bheegti nahi?
Ek haath mein lath, doosre haath mein patta. Seedha chalta, teda dikhta. Kya hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jo hamesha badhti rehti hai, kabhi ghatti nahi — chahe kuch bhi ho jaaye?
hints: Har saal ek baar aata hai

riddles.question: Khata nahi, peeta nahi, phir bhi sab ka pet bharta hai. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jise aap jitna use karo utni khatam hoti jaati hai?
Lamba sa ek daant, khada khada muskurata. Raat bhar jaagta, subah so jaata. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo hath se pakdo to pighal jaaye, chhod do to wapas sakh jaaye?
Bolta nahi, sunta nahi, phir bhi sab ki baat samajhta hai. Kya hai?
Na aankhein hain, na kaan hain, phir bhi duniya bhar ki khabar rakhta hai. Kya hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jo ek baar mila to waapas nahi aata?
Upar se kala, andar se laal, dil mein beej, bolo kaun sa phal?
Ek aadmi roz subah apne ghar se nikla, seedha chala, phir seedha chala, phir seedha chala — aur ghar pahunch gaya. Kaise?
Woh kaun hai jo bina paaon ke chalta hai, bina aankhon ke dekhta hai, bina zuban ke bolta hai?
Aadha paani mein, aadha zameen mein, na pani mein, na zameen mein. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo jitna khaaoge, utna bhaari lagega?
Haath se chalti, paon se nahi. Aankhon se dekhti, zuban se nahi. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jise aap dekhte ho, par woh aapko nahi dekh sakti?
Subah chaar taange, dopahar do taange, shaam teen taange. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo toot ke bhi kaam aata hai?
Pani se nikla, pani mein rahega, phir bhi sukha. Kya hai?
Ek chiz hai jo har cheez mein hai, par har koi dekh nahi sakta. Kya hai?
Raat ko aata hai, subah chala jaata hai, seedha khada hota hai, pair nahi hota. Kya hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jo jitni door jaao, utni paas lagti hai?
Khud jalta hai, doosron ko roshni deta hai. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jiske aane se sab ko khushi hoti hai, aane ke baad sab bhool jaate hain?
Do bhai saath chalte hain, par kabhi ek doosre se nahi milte. Kya hain?
Woh kya hai jo chupta nahi chahta, par dikha nahi sakta?
Ek taraf se jao to kaanta, doosri taraf se jao to daana. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsa rang hai jo har jagah nazar aata hai par rang box mein nahi hota?
Pahaad se aaya, sheher mein khoya. Na kha sakta, na pe sakta, phir bhi sab chahte hain. Kya hai?
Andar se laal, upar se peela, khata hai toh meetha lagta hai. Kya hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jo aap dete hain to apke paas zyada ho jaata hai?
Ek hath mein chaadar, ek haath mein thal. Poori duniya ko rakhti hai sambhal. Kya hai?
Paani se bhari, par muh nahi. Paon nahi par chalta hai. Kya hai?
Woh kaun sa janwar hai jo apna ghar apni peeth par uthata hai?
Woh kya hai jo bolne se toot jaata hai?
Ek darya hai jo bahta nahi, ek pahaad hai jo halta nahi. Kya hain dono?
Woh kya hai jo aap lete ho dene ke liye, aur dete ho lene ke liye?
Khaana khaane se pehle nahi, khaana khaane ke baad bhi nahi, phir bhi dono waqt istemal hota hai. Kya hai?
Teen bhai ek saath chal rahe the. Bade ne kaha — main pehle tha. Chhote ne kaha — main baad mein aaunga. Beech wale ne kaha — main kab aaunga? Kya hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jo badhne par choti aur ghattne par badi ho jaati hai?
Bina paon ke daudta hai, bina haath ke pakadta hai. Kya hai?
Ek baar marta hai, baar baar janam leta hai. Kya hai?
Chhota sa daana, bada sa kaam. Bina iski darkar, ban jaaye andhera shaam. Kya hai?
Gol gol ghoomta, na ruk ruk aaata. Anaj peesti, hawa se chalti. Kya hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jo ek baar use karne ke baad phaink dete hain?
hints: Naak ponchne ke kaam aata hai

riddles.question: Jis pe chalte hain sab log, par woh khud nahi chalta. Kya hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jise aap jitni baar kaatoge, utni baar badh jaayegi?
Andar hi andar jalta hai, bahar nahi aata. Woh kya hai?
Jitna dugna karo, utna aadha ho jaata hai. Kya hai?
Ek ghar hai jisme hazaron rehte hain, par koi darwaza nahi. Kya hai?
Kuch batao — woh kaunsi cheez hai jo kharidte waqt kali, jalaate waqt laal, aur bujhaane ke baad safed ho jaati hai?
Woh kaunsa jaanwar hai jo peeth pe nahi soota?
Khud ganda hota hai par doosron ko saaf karta hai. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jisko tum kabhi dobara nahi kar sakte?
Sab dekh sakte hain, par chhoo nahi sakte. Bahut kareeb hai, phir bhi door hai. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsa planet hai jiske baare mein padhe bina bhi hum sab jaante hain?
Aag ke bina jalta nahi, paani ke bina bujhta nahi. Kya hai?
Woh kaun sa animal hai jo aansu bhaata hai lekin roota nahi?
Woh kya hai jo tum jab bhi dono aankhein band karo tab dikhta hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jo roz pehnte ho lekin kabhi dhote nahi?
Tin ke paon, lohe ki naak, aag pe chadhke paani piye. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jo aag se darti nahi, paani se darti nahi par hawa se darr ke kaanpti hai?
Na sir hai, na pair, phir bhi pura ghar sambhalta hai. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jise sirf ek baar pehna jaata hai aur phir hamesha ke liye rakha jaata hai?
Pahle seedha, phir tedha, phir seedha. Woh kya hai?
Paani se bhaari, paani se halki, paani mein rehti. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jo badhne par choti aur ghattne par badi ho jaati hai?
Bina naak ke saans leta hai, bina paon ke chalta hai. Kya hai?
Ek baar marta hai, baar baar paida hota hai. Kya hai?
Bullet train se bhi tez, aankh jhapakte mein pahunch jaata hai. Kya hai?
Ek ladka upar, ek ladka neeche, dono ek doosre ko nahi dekhte. Kya hain?
Woh kaun hai jo jab aata hai sab khush hote hain, jab jaata hai sab rote hain?
Chaar pair hai lekin chalti nahi, chhat hai lekin ghar nahi. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsa dost hai jo bure waqt mein bhi saath nahi chhodta?
Safed ghar, laal darwaza, andar kala chirag. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo dikhne mein solid hai, touch karo to liquid ho jaata hai?
Woh kya hai jo sirf raat mein nazar aata hai, subah chhup jaata hai?
Woh kaunsa number hai jo seedha likho to 6 aur ulta karo to bhi 6?
100 mein se 10 baaron minus karo — kitna bacha?
Woh kaunsa din hai jo 'kal' tha, 'kal' hoga, lekin 'aaj' kabhi nahi hoga?
Raat ko bolta hoon, din mein chup rehta hoon. Kya hoon main?
Paani mein jaaye to mare na, zameen pe aaye to jeeve na. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jise aap khaate nahi lekin chaate zaroor ho?
Woh kaunsa rang hai jo dikhta hai lekin hota nahi?
Woh kya cheez hai jo dikhti hai lekin pakad nahi sakte?
Ek aisi cheez jo use karne se khatam nahi hoti — ulta aur badh jaati hai. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jise aap apne haath se de sakte ho, lekin kisi ki ungliyan nahi chhoo sakti?
Woh kya hai jo aapke haath mein hai lekin aap ise nahi pakad sakte?
Woh kya hai jo dikhta nahi, par feel hota hai?
Woh kya hai jo sochne se nahi, karne se aata hai?
Woh kaun sa ped hai jis par na patta, na daana, par uski chhaon mein sab baithte hain?
Woh kya hai jo kisi ko doge to tum bhi rakh sakte ho?
Subah ka tara, raat ka andhera, dono milke kya dete hain?
Laal hoon mein, khoon nahi. Peeya jaata hoon magar peena nahi. Kya hoon main?
Woh kya hai jo ek jagah se shuru hoti hai, aur wohin khatam hoti hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jo raat ko unchi hoti hai, din mein neech?
Kisi ke paas hai toh ooncha, kisi ke paas nahi toh neecha. Kya hai?
Jab tak liya, tab tak diya. Jab chhoda, khatam ho gaya. Kya hai?
Woh kaun sa din hai jab doctor bhi doctor ke paas jaata hai?
Woh kya hai jo kahin jaana chahta hai lekin wapas aane ka raasta nahi?
Cricket mein woh kaunsa ped hai jo maidan mein nahi ugta?
Woh kaunsa khiladi hai jo khel mein sabse zyada mehnat karta hai lekin medal nahi leta?
Olympics mein har 4 saal mein kya aata hai?
Woh kaunsi game hai jisme hath se nahi, dimaag se khelate hain?
Football mein woh kaun sa player hota hai jo haath se khel sakta hai?
Duniya ka sabse chhota desh kaun sa hai?
Tajmahal kis shahar mein hai?
Woh kaun tha jisne zero ka concept diya?
Bharat ka national fruit kaun sa hai?
Bollywood ka Badshah kise kehte hain?
3 Idiots mein Rancho ka asli naam kya tha?
Woh kya hai jo computer mein hota hai lekin ghar mein alag hota hai?
Woh kya hai jo bina petrol ke duniya bhar ghoomta hai?
Woh kya hai jo char deewaron mein band hai phir bhi azaad hai?
Woh kounsi bhasha hai jise sab samjhte hain, koi nahi seekhata?
Woh kya hai jo sirf tabhi kaam aata hai jab toot jaaye?
Mitti mein janam, paani se bada, aag se paka. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsa dariya hai jo kabhi samudra nahi pahunchta?
Woh kaun sa animal hai jo apne weight se zyada uthata hai lekin gym nahi jaata?
Neend mein bhi jaagti hoon, jaag mein bhi sooti hoon. Kya hoon?
Woh kaunsa number hai jisko aap jis bhi number se gunna karo, wahi nikalega?
Ek banda paidal 1 ghante mein 4 km chalta hai. Aadhe ghante mein kitna chalega?
Woh kya hai jo aapke haath se dene ke baad bhi aapke paas rehta hai?
Jo jitna paas aao, utna door lagta hai. Woh kya hai?
Woh kaun sa scientist tha jisne gravity aur saib ko ek saath famous kiya?
Woh kounsa machine hai jo sabse zyada use ki jaati hai lekin kabhi thakti nahi?
Planet number 4 kaun hai?
Hum chaar bhai hain, ek saath rehte hain, ek doosre ko kabhi nahi milte. Kaun hain hum?
Woh kya hai jo jab bhi try karo, fail ho jaate ho?
Woh kaun hai jo apni taang pe khada hai par apne paon nahi chhoota?
Woh kounsa janwar hai jo paidal nahi chalta?
Woh kya hai jo jab yahan hai, koi kadra nahi karta — jab chala jaaye sab ro ke yaad karte hain?
hints: Death ke baad yaad aata hai
Jab hota hai tab kadra nahi

riddles.question: Woh kya hai jo paas aao to bhaage, dur jao to aaye?
Ek number hai jise aap kis bhi number se gunna karo, wahi nikalega. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo tum apne haath se kamate ho, doosron ke liye?
Woh kaunsa kaam hai jo karte karte neend aa jaati hai?
Woh kya hai jiske aane se sab khush hote hain, jaane ke baad sab udaas?
Woh kya hai jo tum dono aankhon se dekhte ho lekin kabhi poora nahi dekh sakte?
hints: Selfie ke bina nahi dekh sakte

riddles.question: Woh kya hai jise log roz dhundhte hain phir bhi kabhi nahi milta?
Andar ghusna easy, bahar nikalna mushkil. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsa insaan hai jo apni marzi se kabhi nahi aata?
Raat ko hazar, subah ek bhi nahi. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo ek jagah se shuru hota hai aur wahin khatam hota hai?
Aisa kya hai jo khaali ho tab bhaari, bhar jaaye to halka?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jo kabhi nahi sooti?
Woh kya hai jo tum jitna dur jaao utna tum se paas rehta hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jo hamesha aage chalti hai, kabhi peeche nahi?
Woh kya hai jo sirf ek insaan ke liye hota hai lekin poori duniya use karta hai?
Do raste, ek manzil. Koi ulta jaaye to bhi pahunchega. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo lete hain to dena padta hai, dete hain to lete hain?
Ek aisi cheez batao jo seedha khadi karo to U hai, seedha rakho to nahi?
Woh kya cheez hai jo dekhne mein ek jaisi, par andar se bilkul alag?
Woh kaun sa rang hai jo India ke jhande mein hai lekin paint box mein alag hota hai?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jo roz khaate ho par kabhi pet nahi bharta?
Woh kya hai jo aap hi banate ho, aap hi todh dete ho?
Woh kaunsa darwaza hai jise aap andar se band nahi kar sakte?
Woh kya hai jo toot jaaye to zyada kaam ki ho jaati hai?
Woh kya cheez hai jo paas rakhna chahte ho, par woh khud door jaata hai?
Woh kya hai jo hamesha tumhare saath rehta hai, par koi dekh nahi sakta?
Woh kaunsi cheez hai jo aag se darti nahi, paani se darti nahi, lekin hawa se kaanp jaati hai?
Subah khaali, raat tak bhar jaata hai. Kya hai?
Woh kaunsa phal hai jisme pani hi pani hai?
Woh kya hai jo milne se khushi, bichharne se dard?
Woh kounsi cheez hai jo kabhi galat nahi jaati?
hints: Kabhi na kabhi saamne aata hai

riddles.question: Woh kaun sa number hai jo Roman mein likho, phir ulta karo to bhi same aaye?
Raat ko bolta, din mein chup. Sab ko jaagta rakhta. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo tum kabhi apne aap nahi dekh sakte bina help ke?
Woh kya cheez hai jo teen logon ke beech ek se zyada hoti hai?
hints: Jitne log utna zyada phailta hai

riddles.question: Woh kya hai jo baith ke kaam karo tab bhi, khade ho tab bhi saath rehta hai?
Woh kya hai jo sirf ek baar diya jaata hai aur hamesha ke liye rehta hai?
Woh kaunsa number hai jo add karo 0 bane, multiply karo 0 bane?
Woh kya hai jo doctor bhi nahi bana sakta, lekin ek baar kho jaaye to poori zindagi mushkil?
Woh kya hai jo tum sochte ho hamesha ke liye rakhooge, par sochte sochte bhool jaate ho?
Woh kya cheez hai jo dikhne mein ped jaisi, lekin ped nahi?
Ek aisi cheez jo use karne se khatam nahi hoti — ulta aur badh jaati hai. Kya hai?
hints: Share karo to zyada ho jaata

riddles.question: Woh kya hai jo insaan banata hai lekin woh khud kabhi use nahi karta?
Woh kya cheez hai jo jitni zyada hoti hai, utni kam nazar aati hai?
Woh kaun sa jaanwar hai jo raat ko bhi din ki tarah dekh sakta hai?
Woh kya hai jo tum kabhi seedha nahi dekh sakte?
Woh kya hai jo poori duniya mein ek jaisi hoti hai, koi badal nahi sakta?
Woh kya cheez hai jo tooti nahi, lekin sirf ek baar use hoti hai?
Woh kya hai jo tum jitna chaho utna kharch karo, khatam nahi hota?
Subah ek baar aata hai, lekin baar baar aa sakta hai. Kya hai?
Woh kya hai jo andar bhi hai, bahar bhi hai, lekin na andar hai na bahar?
Woh kya hai jo aap dekhte ho but kabhi poori tarah nahi?
hints: Mirror mein bhi poora nahi dikh sakta

riddles.question: Woh kounsi cheez hai jo free mili, lekin sabse mehengi hai?
Hazaar mein bik jaata hoon, ek kaam ka nahi. Kya hoon?
Woh kaunsa insaan hai jo hamesha seedha bolta hai?
Woh kya hai jo toot jaata hai bina kisi ki aahat ke?
Woh kya hai jis par koi bhi walk kar sakta hai lekin yeh kabhi thakta nahi?
Woh kya hai jo ek baar mila to khona mushkil, kho jaaye to dhoondna mushkil?
Woh kya cheez hai jis ke baare mein sab baat karte hain par koi jaanta nahi?
Woh kaunsa kaam hai jisme jitna karo utna kam lagta hai?
Woh kya hai jo insaan banata hai lekin koi insaan use kabhi nahi dekhta?
